case_title: TJARKO LEIFER ET AL VS. MAPLEBEAR INC,

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) BEAU LACEY, PARALEGAL FOR MAPLEBEAR. FILED BY DEFENDANT MAPLEBEAR INC, D/B/A INSTACART
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $85) SERVED SEP-06-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MAPLEBEAR INC, D/B/A INSTACART

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEIFER, TJARKO LEIFER, AIMEE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MAPLEBEAR INC, D/B/A INSTACART STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,894.29 FILED BY LEIFER, TJARKO LEIFER, AIMEE AS TO DEFENDANT MAPLEBEAR INC, D/B/A INSTACART ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-03-2022 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-03-2022 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-03-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-03-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF TJARKO LEIFER IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AIMEE LEIFER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MAPLEBEAR INC, D/B/A INSTACART IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY BEAU LACEY, PARALEGAL. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
